channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Indian traveller stranded in Qatar takes long road to Riyadh
item.description: Varun Krishnan was flying from Chennai to Barcelona when Iranian attacks stranded him in Doha.

item.title: ‘No endgame’: Why US Democrats say Iran war hearing has them worried
item.description: Lawmakers say the White House has not clearly explained why the US entered the conflict, or how long it may last.

item.title: Australia grants asylum to 2 more members of Iranian women’s football team
item.description: Australia's home affairs minister says a total of seven members of the Iranian women's team have been granted asylum.

item.title: Iran launches wave of heavy, multi-warhead missiles
item.description: The Iranian military released footage of missile launches from what it described as a wave multi-warhead projectiles.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran says US, Israel have hit nearly 10,000 civilian sites
item.description: Iran accuses the US and Israel of targeting civilians, saying more than 1,300 have been killed across the country.

item.title: Democrats say White House offers no clarity on Iran war goals after 11 days
item.description: Party members decry 'disturbing' lack of clarity following latest classified briefing on war justification and aims.

item.title: US civil rights group documents ‘broad attack on Muslim life’ in 2025
item.description: CAIR releases annual report, warning discrimination is likely to continue as Iran war sparks a new wave of hate speech.

item.title: Around 140 US service members wounded in Iran war, Pentagon says
item.description: US Department of Defense says eight service members in critical condition as White House hails progress of assault.

item.title: Unexploded missile extracted from house in western Iran
item.description: Rescue workers carefully extracted an unexploded missile from a house in Kuhdasht City, following US-Israeli airstrikes.

item.title: Lebanese priest killed by Israeli tank fire
item.description: A Maronite Catholic priest has been killed by Israeli tank fire after it targeted a home in southern Lebanon.
